An official website of the United States Government

Official websites use .gov
A .gov website belongs to an official government organization in the United States.

Secure .gov websites use HTTPS
A lock () or https:// means you've safely connected to the .gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.

Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System

The Federal Reserve, the central bank of the United States, provides the nation with a safe, flexible, and stable monetary and financial system.

    This is a modal window. This modal can be closed by pressing the Escape key or activating the close button.

    Accessible Keys for Video

    [Space Bar] toggles play/pause;

    [Right/Left Arrows] seeks the video forwards and back (5 sec );

    [Up/Down Arrows] increase/decrease volume;

    [M] toggles mute on/off;

    [F] toggles fullscreen on/off (Except IE 11);

    The [Tab] key may be used in combination with the [Enter/Return] key to navigate and activate control buttons, such as caption on/off.

    Policy Rate

    Fed Funds Target Range

    3.50% to 3.75%

    Inflation (PCE)

    4.1% May 2026

    Chart

    Line chart with 113 data points.
    The chart has 1 X axis displaying Time. Data ranges from 2017-01-01 00:00:00 to 2026-05-01 00:00:00.
    The chart has 1 Y axis displaying values. Data ranges from 0.5 to 7.2.
    End of interactive chart.
    View More

    Unemployment Rate

    4.3% May 2026

    Chart

    Line chart with 125 data points.
    The chart has 1 X axis displaying Time. Data ranges from 2016-01-01 00:00:00 to 2026-05-01 00:00:00.
    The chart has 1 Y axis displaying values. Data ranges from 3.4 to 14.8.
    End of interactive chart.
    View More

    Gross Domestic Product (GDP)

    +2.1% Q1 2026

    Chart

    Bar chart with 37 bars.
    The chart has 1 X axis displaying Time. Data ranges from 2017-01-01 00:00:00 to 2026-01-01 00:00:00.
    The chart has 1 Y axis displaying values. Data ranges from -28 to 34.9.
    End of interactive chart.
